name: J & J Quality Living Inc
description_short: Credit repair company offering dispute services, creditor negotiation, and credit assessment to help consumers improve their credit scores and achieve financial confidence.
description_long:
J&J Quality Living Inc is a credit repair service based in North Chicago, Illinois, operating since at least 2020. The company positions itself as a solution for consumers struggling with damaged credit who may believe their situation is beyond repair. Their primary focus is helping clients navigate the complex and often stressful process of credit correction through professional intervention and expertise.

The company offers several core services centered on credit repair and financial recovery. These include private credit assessments, direct creditor communication and negotiation on behalf of clients, documentation management and coordination, and credit report dispute services. They claim to be trained on current laws, statutes, and credit reporting practices, with specific knowledge of which negative items most significantly impact credit scores. The company also promotes financial education through a Financial Freedom Forum and keynote speaking engagements.

J&J Quality Living differentiates itself by emphasizing personalized service and comprehensive support—going beyond simple dispute filing to actively handle creditor communications and documentation logistics. Their marketing emphasizes accessibility to those who feel their credit damage is permanent, positioning credit repair as achievable regardless of initial circumstances. The company partners with other financial service providers and has participated in business counseling initiatives.

However, potential customers should note significant limitations. The website provides minimal specific information about pricing, success rates, timelines, or detailed service scope. There is no third-party verification, customer reviews, or regulatory information provided. The About Us page focuses primarily on home renovation services rather than credit repair credentials, creating confusion about the company's actual expertise. The sparse online presence and limited documentation of qualifications raises questions about legitimacy and professionalism for a credit repair service.
address: 2215 Lewis Ave Unit # 2, North Chicago, IL 60064

company_info.headquarters: 2215 Lewis Ave Unit # 2, North Chicago, IL 60064

pros: Offers comprehensive service including creditor contact and documentation management, not just dispute filing
Claims training in current credit laws, statutes, and reporting practices
Provides private personalized credit assessments before starting services
Located at a physical address in North Chicago, Illinois with contact information
Advertises knowledge of which negative items most impact credit scores
Engages in financial education through speaking events and forums
cons: Website provides no pricing information, making cost comparison impossible
No customer reviews, testimonials, or success rate data visible on website
About Us page emphasizes home renovation rather than credit repair expertise or credentials
No information about timeline for results or specific dispute success rates
Minimal regulatory or compliance information displayed (no FTC disclosures visible)
best_for: Consumers with damaged credit who prefer hands-on creditor negotiation rather than self-service disputes
People overwhelmed by credit repair process who want professional documentation management
Those seeking personalized credit assessment before committing to repair services
diagnosis: J&J Quality Living is positioned for consumers seeking professional credit repair with active creditor negotiation, but the company's credibility is undermined by minimal online presence, lack of customer reviews, and insufficient documentation of expertise. Prospective clients should request detailed pricing, success rates, and regulatory compliance information before engaging services.
services: Creditor contact and negotiation on client behalf
